title: 0,5 HP
description: If you fall from any height, you will have at least half your health left.
body:
## Description
If you fall from any height, you will have at least half your health left.

![preview](https://i.postimg.cc/MXkh3x0b/preview.gif)

## Dependencies
- Fabric loader requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
